description: The Mbira Renaissance Band is one of Edmonton's most exciting groups. Their first full-length 2025 album, Roto, reached the top spot on the CKUA radio charts in its first week. Centered around the soulful sounds of the mbira, a traditional instrument from Zimbabwe, their music offers a fresh, energetic and spellbinding experience of cyclical arrangements, polyrhythm, layered vocals and improvisation. Seamlessly moving between re-interpretations of traditional repertoires and original compositions the band sings songs of family, heritage, celebrations and gatherings.
title: The Mbira Renaissance Band Concert
